questionText: What Bible story does this image depict?
insightText: John 13:1-17 — Jesus washes his disciples' feet, teaching them to serve one another with humility.

questionText: What Bible story does this image depict?
answerText: The Parable of the Lost Son
insightText: Luke 15:11-32 — A father welcomes back his wayward son with open arms, illustrating God's boundless forgiveness and love.

questionText: What Bible story does this image depict?
answerText: Jesus Forgives and Heals a Paralyzed Man
insightText: Mark 2:1-12, Luke 5:18-25 — Friends lower a paralyzed man through the roof to Jesus, who first forgives his sins and then heals him.

questionText: What Bible story does this image depict?
answerText: Jesus Talks with a Samaritan Woman
insightText: John 4:1-26 — Jesus breaks social barriers by speaking with a Samaritan woman at the well, offering her living water.

questionText: What Bible story does this image depict?
answerText: Jesus Anointed at Bethany / A Sinful Woman Forgiven
insightText: Matthew 26:6-13; Mark 14:3-9; Luke 7:36-50; John 12:1-8 — A woman anoints Jesus with costly perfume, and He defends her act of devotion and declares her sins forgiven.

questionText: What Bible story does this image depict?
insightText: Luke 10:25-37 — A Samaritan stops to help a beaten man on the road, showing that loving your neighbor means showing mercy to anyone in need.

questionText: What Bible story does this image depict?
answerText: The Parable of the Lost Sheep
insightText: Luke 15:1-7, Matthew 18:10-14 — A shepherd leaves his ninety-nine sheep to search for the one that is lost, illustrating God's relentless love for every individual.

questionText: What Bible story does this image depict?
answerText: Jesus Heals a Man with Leprosy
insightText: Matthew 8:1-4, Mark 1:40-45, Luke 5:12-16 — Jesus reaches out and touches a man with leprosy, healing him and showing compassion to the outcast.
